languages.text: "Наглядно, но все же проговори словами, что ты пытался продемонстрировать".
"Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."
languages.original_text: "Наглядно, но все же проговори словами, что ты пытался продемонстрировать".

traits.locale_text: "Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."
"Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."
"Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."

languages.text: 「わかりやすいけど、それでも、あなたが示そうとしていたことを言葉で説明して」
languages.original_text: "Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."

languages.text: "Erhellend, aber trotzdem, beschreibt mit Worten, was Ihr demonstrieren wolltet."
languages.original_text: "Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."

traits.locale_text: "Erhellend, aber trotzdem, beschreibt mit Worten, was Ihr demonstrieren wolltet."

languages.text: «Esclarecedor; aun así, describa con palabras lo que pretendía demostrar».
languages.original_text: "Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."

traits.locale_text: «Esclarecedor; aun así, describa con palabras lo que pretendía demostrar».

languages.text: "Aydınlatıcı ama yine de ne göstermeye çalıştığını kelimelerle anlat."
languages.original_text: "Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."

traits.locale_text: "Aydınlatıcı ama yine de ne göstermeye çalıştığını kelimelerle anlat."

languages.text: « Excellente démonstration, mais tâchez quand même de me décrire ce que vous faites avec des mots. »
languages.original_text: "Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."

traits.locale_text: « Excellente démonstration, mais tâchez quand même de me décrire ce que vous faites avec des mots. »

languages.text: “很有启发性，但还是请你用语言阐述你想说明的内容。”
languages.original_text: "Illuminating, but still, describe in words what you were trying to demonstrate."

traits.locale_text: “很有启发性，但还是请你用语言阐述你想说明的内容。”
